description: OpenCodeHub MVP acceptance baseline. Refreshed by scripts/acceptance.sh + packages/eval/src/opencodehub_eval/bench.py.
notes: 49 parametrized cases = 7 languages (ts, js, py, go, rust, java, csharp) x 7 tools (list_repos, query, context, impact, detect_changes, rename, sql).
Baseline populated from the first clean-room MVP run; update on every tagged release.
